related.name: XVIII. The Moon
related.teaser: The Moon is the dream-lens of the unconscious, a shimmering path of illusion and initiation.

related.name: ♆ Neptune
related.teaser: Neptune is the ocean of spirit — dream wave, mystic tide, abyss of compassion.

related.name: ᛈ Perthro
related.teaser: Perthro is the cup you upend when the question is ready.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: II. The High Priestess
related.teaser: The High Priestess veils and unveils — water of intuition reflecting the unspoken truths.

related.name: XVII. The Star
related.teaser: The Star is the light of renewal — a cosmic beacon, pouring hope into the waters of the soul.

related.name: Oshun
related.teaser: Sacral is the womb of becoming — water’s embrace, desire’s tide, the dance of creation.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: 🟠 Sacral (Svadhisthana)
related.teaser: Sacral is the womb of becoming — water’s embrace, desire’s tide, the dance of creation.
